shellCommands.command:
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/demo-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar &>/tmp/spring.log &
echo "PID=$!"
# Wait for the server to be ready
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  if curl -s http://localhost:3000/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "READY"
    break
  fi
  sleep 1
done

echo "=== Test 1: GET / (no name) ==="
curl -s http://localhost:3000/

echo ""
echo "=== Test 2: GET /?name=World ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=World"

echo ""
echo "=== Test 3: GET /?name=Alice ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=Alice"

echo ""
echo "=== Test 4: GET /?name=%20%20Bob%20%20 (trimmed) ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20"

echo ""
echo "=== Test 5: GET /?name=%20%20%20%20 (whitespace-only -> world) ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20%20%20"

echo ""
echo "=== Content-Type check ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{content_type}" http://localhost:3000/
kill $(ps aux | grep 'java -jar target/demo' | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}') 2>/dev/null; echo "stopped"
